description.ko: 청각적 주파수를 시각적으로 탐구하여, 디지털 공간 속에서 음파를 빛과 기하학의 매혹적인 춤으로 변환한 작품입니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of auditory frequencies, transforming sound waves into a mesmerizing dance of light and geometry within a digital void.

prompt: Cinematic sound visualization, ECHO-0 style, abstract flowing liquid frequencies, glowing neon blue and violet sonic waves, 8k resolution, mathematical symmetry, particle trails, dark ambient background, futuristic synthwave aesthetic, high contrast, sharp details.
